ddls:
CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the property */,
  "ratings" REAL /* Average rating of the property */,
  "cost_per_night" TEXT /* Cost per night to book the property */,
  "guests_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of guests the property can accommodate */,
  "bedrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bedrooms in the property */,
  "beds" INTEGER /* Number of beds available in the property */,
  "bathrooms" TEXT /* Number of bathrooms in the property */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the owner listing the property */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Type of property (e.g., house, apartment, hotel) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the property */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the property is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the property is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the property is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Postal/ZIP code of the property */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* List of amenities provided by the property */,
  "house_rules" TEXT /* House rules for the property */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the property */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the property was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the property was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES owners ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "owners" (
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property owner */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Full name of the property owner */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the owner */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the owner */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the owner */,
  "identification_number" TEXT /* Identification number of the owner (e.g., passport, driver's license) */,
  "verification_status" TEXT /* Verification status of the owner (e.g., verified, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bookings" (
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each booking */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being booked */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the booking */,
  "check_in_date" TEXT /* Check-in date for the booking */,
  "check_out_date" TEXT /* Check-out date for the booking */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the booking */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the booking (e.g., confirmed, cancelled) */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status of the booking (e.g., paid, pending) */,
  "guest_details" TEXT /* Details of the guests (e.g., names, ages) */,
  "special_requests" TEXT /* Special requests made by the guest (e.g., extra towels) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("booking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* Profile picture of the user */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Short bio of the user */,
  "verification_status" TEXT /* Verification status of the user (e.g., verified, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who submitted the review */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Review comment provided by the user */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was submitted */,
  "response" TEXT /* Response from the property owner or host */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment transaction */,
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated booking */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date when the payment was made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount paid */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the payment (e.g., completed, pending) */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Transaction ID for the payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_booking_id FOREIGN KEY ("booking_id") REFERENCES bookings ("booking_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cancellations" (
  "cancellation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cancellation */,
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* ID of the booking that was cancelled */,
  "cancellation_date" TEXT /* Date of the cancellation */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason provided for the cancellation */,
  "refund_amount" REAL /* Refund amount given to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cancellation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cancellations_booking_id FOREIGN KEY ("booking_id") REFERENCES bookings ("booking_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "amenities" (
  "amenity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each amenity */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property that offers the amenity */,
  "amenity_name" TEXT /* Name of the amenity (e.g., WiFi, Pool) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the amenity */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL of the icon representing the amenity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("amenity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_amenities_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property the image is associated with */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL where the image is hosted */,
  "caption" TEXT /* Caption for the image */,
  "is_cover_photo" INTEGER /* Indicator if the image is the cover photo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_images_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_addresses" (
  "address_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each address */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the address */,
  "street" TEXT /* Street name of the address */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the user resides */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the user resides */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the user resides */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Postal/ZIP code of the address */,
  "is_primary" INTEGER /* Indicator if the address is the primary address */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("address_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_addresses_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Indicator if the notification has been read by the user */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., booking confirmation, cancellation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_calendar" (
  "calendar_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each calendar entry */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property the calendar entry belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the calendar entry */,
  "available" INTEGER /* Indicator if the property is available on the date */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the property on the date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("calendar_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_calendar_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "booking_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each booking request */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being requested */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the request */,
  "check_in_date" TEXT /* Check-in date for the request */,
  "check_out_date" TEXT /* Check-out date for the request */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the request (e.g., pending, accepted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_booking_requests_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_booking_requests_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "messages" (
  "message_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each message */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user sending the message */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property the message is related to */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the message */,
  "sent_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the message was sent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("message_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_messages_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_messages_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)
